text: I had a powerful speech on AI a few weeks ago at the AI Summit in France. In it, you spoke about the talent pool for AI engineers in India. I think it's probably one of the biggest pools of brilliant engineers in the world.
आपका इंडिया अपने लिएटर करता है?
What does it take for India to start winning, and leading the world in AI?

...I'd like to say......whatever the world does for EIA......EIA is incomplete without India......it's a very responsible statement......look......what's your own experience......in terms of EIA?...I myself......you've heard my speech......Paris-like... So, you gave, actually, in your speech, a brilliant example of the...positive impact of AI......and the limitations of AI. I think the example you gave is......when you ask it to generate... If you ask it to generate an image of a person writing with your left hand, it's always going to generate a person, writing with their right-hand. So in that way, the West creating an AI system, where India is not part of that process, is always gonna generate the person with the right hand. It's an essential part of what the world is. ...historically......but especially......in the 21st century. I think......AI......development......is......a collaboration......where......everyone......can......support......each......other......with......experience......and learning. And......India......shouldn't......just......make......its model....but......according......to......specific......use......cases. Mindsetshift happening in India......historical factors... technical factors, government-oriented, or lack of good support systems. Is this right? Others might think it's too late. When 5G came, the world thought we're far behind in 5G. But once we did it, ...

But also, if you look, many of the top tech leaders, first of all, tech talent, but tech leaders in the U.S. are of Indian origin. Sundar Pichai, Sachin Nadella, Aravind Sivanath, you've met with some of them. I've met with some of them. What......spirit......of their......Indian......origins......do......you......think......they......carry......in......them......that......enables them......to......be......so......successful? ...a step forward......every time......and......it's humans......who......experience......that technology......in the best way. And......I think...
एइ के कारण इन्सान को इंशान हुनेका मतलब सोचना पड़ रहा है

I agree with you. It does make me, and a lot of people, wonder what makes humans special, because it seems that there's a lot that makes humans' special. The imagination, the creativity, your imagination, your creativity, your consciousness, your ability to be afraid, to love, to dream,
Just think outside of the box.
